description_long: This is a long, slender knife or short sword with a slightly curved, single-edged blade. The blade features a pronounced recurve near the tip and a serrated section along the spine, suggesting a tactical or survival design. The blade appears metallic with a weathered, possibly blood-stained finish, adding a rugged and utilitarian aesthetic. The handle is straight, dark-colored, and likely made of a synthetic or wooden material, with a subtle ergonomic contour for grip. There is a small, raised section at the junction of the blade and handle, but no prominent guard. The overall design is aggressive and functional, suitable for both cutting and thrusting tasks.
description: A long, curved, single-edged knife or short sword with a serrated spine and a dark, straight handle. The blade has a rugged, weathered finish and a tactical appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, serrated spine, and straight handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curve, serrations, and handle details from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's thin profile and handle width.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark-colored, likely wood or plastic, subtle ergonomic contour
